product: Python unit testing in the workspace
tagline: Databricks now provides integrated Python unit testing tools in the workspace.
what_it_does: Databricks now provides integrated Python unit testing tools in the workspace. Use the tests sidebar, inline execution glyphs, and testing results bottom panel tab to discover, run, and debug pytest based tests. Databricks provides a suite of tools to discover, run, and track Python unit tests directly in the workspace.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: Refresh tests Monitor test status
capabilities.desc: Refresh tests Monitor test status: View the  pass or  fail status of each discovered test. Filter tests: Filter the test list by…

key_takeaway: Databricks now provides integrated Python unit testing tools in the workspace.
